creator: a.maire@s2mi.fr
text:
Hi Kurt,

No, I'm not the maintainer of the unifi2 and 3 port.

I use the scripts for create unifi4.

From what I've seen, Mark Felder who is the maintainer of unifi2 and 3.

In the Makefile i writed :

# This Makefile is based on (unifi2 & unifi3) of Mark Felder <feld@FreeBSD.org>


Best regards :)

al.
